blockers: Source evidence is captured but not reviewed.
WorkoutItem is integrated only as an optional module; the full Workouts section and source-reviewed workout behavior are not validated.
TrendCard and AwardBadge are composed into SummaryDashboard as optional semantic modules, but source-reviewed layout, tokens, density, accessibility, and transferability remain unresolved.
Bottom Nav is treated as deferred source app shell and is not part of the current transferable core.
Required versus optional module boundaries are runtime-tested for TrendCard and AwardBadge but not source-reviewed.
No-data, goal-completed, overachieved, permission-denied, and unavailable-data states are not runtime-tested.
Semantic tokens remain pending and raw token values are not extracted.
Accessibility expectations are not reviewed enough for promotion.
candidates.nextAction: Keep SummaryDashboard in reverse surface and review source-backed layout, density, accessibility, and token evidence before any promotion.

blockers: Exact source geometry, stroke behavior, and color-variable mapping are not confirmed.
Accessibility behavior is drafted but not reviewed with assistive technology or automated checks.
Unavailable state semantics need product-level confirmation before promotion.
Transfer beyond the captured Activity context is not yet proven.
candidates.nextAction: Review source-backed geometry, unavailable semantics, and accessibility behavior before considering promotion.

blockers: MetricCard versus WorkoutItem boundary is documented, but cross-component composition is not reviewed.

blockers: WorkoutItem is integrated into SummaryDashboard only as an optional module.

Input contract and accessibility behavior are drafted but not reviewed with assistive technology or automated checks.

blockers: TrendCard has minimum component-level runtime validation with synthetic data only.

candidates.nextAction: Review TrendCard runtime results, add missing states only when scoped, and keep SummaryDashboard composition deferred.

blockers: AwardBadge has minimum component-level runtime validation with synthetic data only.

Boundary with TrendCard, MetricCard, and WorkoutItem is clearer after runtime validation, but source-reviewed composition is not complete.
Accessibility behavior is drafted but not reviewed with automated checks or assistive technology.
SummaryDashboard composition should wait for a separate composition review.
candidates.nextAction: Review AwardBadge runtime results, add missing states only when scoped, and keep SummaryDashboard composition deferred.

blockers: Concept loop coverage is component-level and synthetic, not source-reviewed.
TrendCard and AwardBadge are composed into SummaryDashboard as optional semantic modules, but the composition is synthetic and not source-reviewed.
Tokens, layout, density, and accessibility remain unreviewed at system level.
Transferability is semantically plausible but not validated through migration experiments.
SourceStatus remains captured and must not be treated as reviewed.
candidates.nextAction: Use the concept loop review to guide SummaryDashboard semantic composition; do not promote the system model.

blockers: TrendCard and AwardBadge are composed into SummaryDashboard only as optional semantic modules with synthetic runtime validation data.
Page-level accessibility, module density, ordering, and combined empty states remain drafted or minimally tested only.
Source evidence remains captured, not reviewed.
Token values and visual system decisions remain pending.

blockers: Metric typography CSS execution is planned but not written.

notes: Promotion status is intentionally separate from sourceStatus. runtime-tested-minimum does not mean promoted.
